Significant increase in volume has been observed in Vesuvius India Limited. The Exchange, in order to ensure that investors have latest relevant information about the company and to inform the market place so that the interest of the investors is safeguarded, had written to the company. Vesuvius India Limited has submitted their response. |SUBJECT: Spurt in Volume
